name: Cova Cannabis POS API
what_it_does: Cova REST API for cannabis dispensary iPad-based point-of-sale and retail management platform. Enables AI agents to manage cannabis product catalogs and inventory, process compliant retail transactions with age verification, integrate with METRC and Canadian provincial seed-to-sale tracking, handle loyalty and customer management, access real-time sales reporting and analytics, and connect dispensary operations with compliance and ERP systems.
use_cases: Managing cannabis inventory and product catalog from dispensary management agents
Processing compliant retail transactions from POS automation agents
Syncing compliance tracking data with METRC and provincial systems from regulatory agents
Accessing sales performance analytics from business intelligence agents
not_for: Non-cannabis retail without compliance tracking requirements
Cannabis cultivation without retail dispensary focus
Jurisdictions where cannabis retail is not legally permitted
best_when: A licensed cannabis dispensary in Canada or the US using Cova POS wants AI agents to automate inventory management, transaction compliance, customer loyalty, and regulatory reporting.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Cannabis retail requires state/provincial licensing. Age verification mandatory for every transaction. METRC compliance errors risk license revocation.

auth.notes: Cova uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Dispensary-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. Scopes control inventory, transaction, and reporting access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — cannabis retail enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-location pricing; enterprise pricing for multi-store operators
pricing.notes: Edmonton, Alberta Canada. Founded 2015. iPad-native cannabis POS. Strong Canadian cannabis market. Used by licensed retailers across Canada and US. Known for fast transaction processing and compliance-first design.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in partner portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: State/provincial cannabis license required; strict regulatory compliance mandatory
No public MCP server — REST API with partner program access
Age verification mandatory — must be integrated into automated transaction flows
METRC and provincial tracking compliance critical for license protection
iPad-native design — API designed around touchscreen retail workflow patterns
Strong Canadian focus — API supports both metric and imperial and bilingual requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cannabis customer and compliance data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US/Canadian data residency. License and tracking compliance mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cannabis compliance and customer data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US/Canadian data residency. Regulatory compliance mandatory.
